executiveSummary: This suspicious transaction report details a pattern of financial activity consistent with money laundering, involving the opening of multiple unauthorized bank accounts, systematic revenue diversion, and asset concealment exceeding R10.2M.

suspects.name: Peter Andrew Faucitt
suspects.involvement: Authorized account openings; beneficiary of diverted revenue.

suspects.name: Rynette Farrar
suspects.involvement: Opened 8 ABSA accounts using stolen card details; executed revenue diversion.

suspects.name: Daniel Jacobus Bantjies
suspects.involvement: Facilitated trust-to-company fund flows; concealed R5.4M stock disappearance.

suspiciousTransactions.indicator: Account opened using stolen card details

suspiciousTransactions.description: Shopify revenue stream diverted to new accounts

suspiciousTransactions.indicator: 99.8% asset strip within days of court order

moneyLaunderingIndicators.indicator: Multiple account openings in short period
moneyLaunderingIndicators.evidence: 8 ABSA accounts opened using Daniel's stolen card
Shopify sales diverted from legitimate accounts
99.8% of company funds extracted within days

requestForAction: Investigate all ABSA accounts opened by Rynette Farrar for suspicious activity.
Freeze accounts pending investigation under s26 of the FIC Act.
Issue section 27 report to all accountable institutions involved.
Refer to SAPS for criminal investigation under POCA.
